pi_items.source: Google Play Store and APK repositories confirm this is a real Android application for flight crew members. Verified via web search: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.robert.fcView&hl=en_US
Task description states 'enable the system-wide Dark theme' and export_result.sh checks for 'Night mode: yes'. Verifier.py confirms the expected final state is is_dark_mode_enabled=true.
verifier.py line 158 explicitly sets pass threshold: 'passed = score >= 55' with comment: 'Pass threshold: 55 pts (Must at least set system mode + be in app OR set mode + visual confirm)'

privileged_info_summary: The enable_dark_theme task operates on Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView), which is a real third-party Android application for aviation professionals available on Google Play Store. The task runs in a synthetic Android emulator environment with hardcoded test credentials. The task requires enabling the system-wide Android Dark theme and returning to the app. The success criteria requires a minimum score of 55 points, which is achieved by: (1) enabling system Dark Mode (40 pts), (2) returning the app to foreground (15 pts), and optionally (3) visual verification of dark theme rendering (30 pts) and visual change from initial light state (15 pts). The expected final state is that the Android night mode setting is set to 'yes' (enabled).
